Patch Set 15:

What ever happened to this patch?  I think it would be very good to have proper layout locking for directories, so that when we are ready to implement directory restriping it will work properly.

This should be moved to an open bug so it can be properly tracked again.

parents.subject: LU-4925 lmv: validate lock with correct stripe FID

commit.subject: LU-7357 lmv: add layout lock to striped directory
commit.message:
LU-7357 lmv: add layout lock to striped directory

During unlink striped directory, master MDT needs to
invalidate the layout on the client cache, so client
will try to refresh the layout, and then be notified
the object has been unlinked.

1. Client will set Layout to be valid, if getattr or
open return layout lock.

2. If client check layout has been invalid, it needs to
refresh(enqueue the layout lock) the layout before using
it.

3. Add a few tests to check the process.

Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ic662eddd00e0e22bb606adb50a426d63ef563330
